title: Full-Day Daycare
description: Our comprehensive daycare programme provides all-day care for preschool-aged children, combining educational activities with play, rest, and meals in a structured daily routine.
features: Structured daily routine with educational activities
Nutritious meals and healthy snacks provided
Qualified and caring staff maintaining ideal ratios
Safe, stimulating indoor and outdoor environments
Regular updates to parents on child's activities

title: After-School Programme
description: Our after-school programme provides a supportive environment for school-aged children to complete homework, engage in enrichment activities, and enjoy supervised recreation after regular school hours.
features: Supervised homework help and study support
Enrichment activities — arts, crafts, music, and more
Indoor and outdoor games and recreation
Safe and secure environment until parents arrive

title: Holiday Camps
description: During school holidays and breaks, we offer special camp programmes filled with fun activities, field trips, and themed projects to keep children engaged and entertained.
features: Full-day programme from 8:00 AM to 5:30 PM
